label: Room Health Test
info:
Nightly AV room health test. Connects to Cisco codecs via JSXAPI (WSS), runs audio diagnostics, captures events, reports pass/fail to Zabbix via history.push API.

Trigger: POST /test/:systemName/health
Body: {"codec_ip": "...", "codec_auth": "base64(user:pass)", "zbx_host": "..."}

Requires: jsxapi npm package, ZABBIX_API_URL and ZABBIX_API_TOKEN env vars or flow globals.

name: Validate & respond 202
Run JSXAPI health test
Build history.push payload
Build error result
